diagrams.title: Capacity Tracking Tool Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the layered architecture of capacity tracking tools from data collection to presentation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how capacity data flows from infrastructure to actionable insights

diagrams.title: Agent-based vs Agentless Monitoring
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing deployment models for capacity tracking
elements: Agent-based: Agent on each device → Central Server
Comparison: Data depth, Deployment effort, Resource usage, Use cases
diagrams.purpose: Choosing the right monitoring approach for different scenarios

diagrams.title: Threshold Alerting Workflow
diagrams.description: Process flow showing how thresholds lead to alerts and actions
elements: Metric Collection → Compare with Threshold → Within Limit (Continue) / Exceeded (Trigger Alert) → Notification (Email/SMS) → Admin Action → Issue Resolution
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the alerting mechanism in capacity tracking

diagrams.title: Key Metrics Dashboard Layout
diagrams.description: Sample dashboard showing four primary capacity metrics
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how capacity data is presented to administrators
